meaning: n.一种多泡沫含奶油的甜点
examples: The various components like coconut mousse, candied pineapple and coconut dacquiose are flavors that I, who grew up in a tropical country, can identify with.
He had even put mousse in his hair.
B: The mousse helps shape my hair.
But he's even prouder of his "Chocomole" -- a healthy chocolate mousse made with avocados.
My favorite pan-Latin restaurant in New York, Esperanto, finishes off its meals with a frothy passion fruit mousse.
